about.title: About Vision Coaching
about.subtitle: Building Bright Futures Since Day One
about.body: Vision Coaching Institute in Tulsipur has been shaping the academic futures of students from Classes 6 to 12. Our expert faculty, personalized approach, and proven methodology have helped hundreds of students achieve top results in CBSE, ICSE, ISC, and UP Board examinations.
about.visionBody: To be the most trusted coaching institute in Tulsipur — empowering every student with knowledge, confidence, and the skills to excel in board exams and beyond.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything parents & students ask before enrolling

items.a: We provide expert coaching for CBSE, ICSE, ISC, and UP Board students from Classes 6 to 12 — all under one roof.
We strictly maintain small batches of 15–20 students so every child receives personal attention from our faculty.

items.q: Do you offer free demo classes?
items.a: Yes! Free demo classes are available every Saturday. Call or WhatsApp us to book your slot — no commitment required.
We specialise in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology for all four boards from Class 6 to 12.
Morning: 7–9 AM (6th–8th), 9:30–11:30 AM (9th–10th). Evening: 5–7 PM (11th–12th). Monday to Saturday.
Dedicated daily doubt-solving sessions are held after every lecture. Faculty is also reachable on WhatsApp for quick queries.

items.q: How do I enrol my child?
items.a: Simply call us or send a WhatsApp message. We will schedule a free demo class and walk you through the admission process.

feeCard.title: Simple, Transparent Fees
feeCard.subtitle: No hidden charges. Pay monthly. Cancel anytime.
feeCard.privacyNote: No spam. We'll only call to confirm your seat.

enquiryForm.title: Quick Enquiry
